issuer_name_as_stated: Yatharth Hospital & Trauma Care Services Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table lists criminal proceedings against the Company (2), other directors (1), Promoters (2), and Subsidiaries (1), totaling 6; all statutory/regulatory and tax proceeding cells against the Company and Subsidiaries are shown as “-” and are counted as zero. The group-only quantified litigation amount is ₹5.00 million against the Company plus ₹0.74 million against Subsidiaries, or ₹5.74 million; Promoter personal matters and all “By” rows were excluded. Contingent liabilities use the explicitly stated Total of ₹2,358.44 million as at March 31, 2023, rather than a re-sum of the guarantee lines. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10: ₹5.74 million = ₹0.574 crore and ₹2,358.44 million = ₹235.844 crore. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue concentration percentage is disclosed for a full fiscal year.
